title: CRIMINAL STREET GANGS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 12.  CRIMINAL STREET GANGS

§1401.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Street Terrorism Enforcement and Prevention Act".  

Acts 1990, No. 230, §1.
